subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #018 The Greatness of Christ
subcodes.first_line: A great man is a great man whether or not he is born of a human father. If being without a father were a virtue
subcodes.first_line_orig: شخصی بزرگوار خواه بی‌پدر خواه باپدر یکسانست بی‌پدری اگر فضیلت است
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @Manifestation of God as recipient of divine revelation; Holy Spirit, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @Christ; Christianity, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary, @The Holy Spirit
